Home About & Privacy

About UPF

Next-generation Image Compression powered by Rust and WebAssembly.

The Technology

Universal Pixel Format (UPF) is an experimental compression architecture designed for maximum performance and hardware compatibility. UPF achieves significant reductions in file size while maintaining high visual fidelity.

Unlike traditional formats that rely on complex, heavy-weight decoders, UPF is designed to be lean, fast, and "bare-metal" ready.

Privacy & Security

100% Client-Side Processing

Your privacy is our top priority. We believe that your data should never leave your machine unless absolutely necessary.

The UPF Quantum Compressor runs **entirely in your browser**. When you "upload" an image, it is processed locally.

No image data is ever sent to a server. There is no backend recording your photos, no tracking cookies analyzing your content, and no cloud-based processing. Everything happens locally in your browser's RAM and is immediately cleared when you close the tab.

© 2026 UPF Project. Built with ❤️ for the Open Web.
